title: taraxacum bisectum
intro: Taraxacum bisectum, also known as the lesser dandelion or false dandelion, is a species of plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum bisectum include its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
